segments.text: TUTOR: Hello, can I help you?
segments.translation: 指导老师：你好，我有什么能帮你吗？

segments.text: BRIAN: I was told to come here, because I'd like to talk to someone about taking a management course.
segments.translation: 布莱恩：我是被告知来这里的，因为我想和这里的某个人讨论下关于参加一门管理课程方面的事。

segments.text: TUTOR: Right. I'm one of the tutors, so I should be able to help you.
segments.translation: 指导老师：好的。我是指导老师之一，所以我应该能够帮到你。

segments.text: BRIAN: Oh, good. My name's Brian Ardley.
segments.translation: 布莱恩：哦，好的。我名字是布莱恩阿德利。

segments.text: I've decided to enroll on a part-time management course.
segments.translation: 我决定了报名参加一个兼职的管理课程。

segments.text: A friend of mine took one last year, and recommended it to me.
segments.translation: 我的一个朋友去年参加了一个，然后把这个课程推荐给了我。

segments.text: TUTOR: Right.
segments.translation: 指导老师：好的。

segments.text: BRIAN: Is there anything I should do before the course, like reading or anything?
segments.translation: 布莱恩：课前我需要做些什么吗，比如读些什么或者做点什么？

segments.text: TUTOR: We prefer to integrate reading with the course, so we don't give out a reading list in advance.
segments.translation: 指导老师：我们倾向于将阅读整合在课程当中，所以课前我们并不会给出一个书单。

segments.text: But we like people to write a case study, describing an organization they know.
segments.translation: 但我们希望人们可以写一个案例分析，描述他们知道的一个组织机构。

segments.text: BRIAN: I've already done that, my friends told me you wanted one.
segments.translation: 布莱恩：这个我已经写好了，我朋友说你们想看这个。

segments.text: But would it be possible to sit in on a teaching session, to see what it's like?
segments.translation: 有没有可能旁听一节教学课程呢？我想看看课堂内的样子。

segments.text: I haven't been a student for quite a while.
segments.translation: 我已经很长时间没当过学生了。

segments.text: TUTOR: Fine. Just let me know which date, and I'll arrange it with the tutor.
segments.translation: 指导老师：好的。只要告诉我哪天就行，我会跟当天的指导老师安排这个事。

segments.text: BRIAN: Now, could I ask you about the college facilities, please?
segments.translation: 布莱恩：那么我能问问你学校的有关设施吗？

segments.text: TUTOR: Anything in particular?
segments.translation: 指导老师：有具体的方面吗？

segments.text: BRIAN: Well, the course is one day a week, all day, isn't it?
segments.translation: 布莱恩：是这样，课程是每周上一天，全天，对吧？

segments.text: So presumably it's possible to buy food?
segments.translation: 所以我觉得应该可以买到食物吧？

segments.text: TUTOR: Yes, the refectory's open all day.
segments.translation: 指导老师：是的，校餐厅全天开放。

segments.text: BRIAN: Does it cater for special diets? I have some food allergies.
segments.translation: 布莱恩：餐厅能够迎合特殊饮食吗？我有食物过敏。

segments.text: TUTOR: Provided you warn the refectory in advance, it won't be a problem.
segments.translation: 指导老师：只要你提前通知餐厅就行，没什么问题。

segments.text: BRIAN: Good. What about facilities for young children?
segments.translation: 布莱恩：好的。有小孩子相关的设施吗？

segments.text: I'd like to bring my daughter here while I'm studying.
segments.translation: 我学习的时候想带我女儿来。

segments.text: TUTOR: How old is she?
segments.translation: 指导老师：她多大了呢？

segments.text: BRIAN: Three.
segments.translation: 布莱恩：三岁。

segments.text: TUTOR: Then she's eligible to join the nursery, which is supervised by a qualified Nursery Nurse.
segments.translation: 指导老师：那么她是适合来我们托儿所的，这里是由具备认证资质的护理人员管理的。

segments.text: The waiting list for a place is quite long though, so you ought to apply now.
segments.translation: 不过排队的人挺多的，所以你最好现在就申请。

segments.text: BRIAN: OK.
segments.translation: 布莱恩：好的。

segments.text: TUTOR: I don't know if our careers advice service would be of any interest to you?
segments.translation: 指导老师：我想问问你是否对我们的职业规划服务感兴趣呢？

segments.text: BRIAN: yes, it might help me decide how to develop my career after the course.
segments.translation: 布莱恩：是的，这可能会对我在结课后该确定如何发展事业有帮助。

segments.text: TUTOR: The centre has a lot of reference materials, and staff qualified to give guidance on a one-to-one basis.
segments.translation: 指导老师：中心有很多的参考文献资料，而且员工也都具备资质来提供一对一的指导。

segments.text: BRIAN: I noticed a fitness centre next to the college.
segments.translation: 布莱恩：我注意到大学附近有健身房。

segments.text: Is that for students?
segments.translation: 是给学生用的吗？

segments.text: TUTOR: It's open to everyone, but students pay an annual fee that's much less than the general public pay.
segments.translation: 指导老师：那个是对公众开放的，但学生花费的年费比普通公众少很多。

segments.text: BRIAN: And presumably the college library stocks newspapers and journals, as well as books?
segments.translation: 布莱恩：学校图书馆是不是有很多报纸、期刊以及书籍呢？

segments.text: TUTOR: Yes, and there's also an audio-visual room, for viewing and listening to videos, cassettes, and so on.
segments.translation: 指导老师：是啊，而且还有一个视听室用来观看或者收听视频、磁带等等。

segments.text: BRIAN: Is there also access to computers?
segments.translation: 布莱恩：那里有电脑使用吗？

segments.text: TUTOR: Yes, your tutor will need to arrange with the technical support team for you to get a password, so ask him or her about it when you start the course.
segments.translation: 指导老师：有的，你的导师需要和技术支持团队一起为你安排一个密码，所以开课后你问他／她就行。

segments.text: BRIAN: OK.
segments.translation: 布莱恩：好的。

segments.text: TUTOR: By the way, do you know about our Business Centre?
segments.translation: 指导老师：顺便问一下，你知道我们的商务中心吗？

segments.text: BRIAN: No.
segments.translation: 布莱恩：不知道啊。

segments.text: What's that?
segments.translation: 那是什么？

segments.text: TUTOR: It's a training resource - a collection of materials for people to study on their own, or use in their own organizations.
segments.translation: 指导老师：是一个培训资料库，有一系列的资料供人们自学或为他们的公司所用。

segments.text: BRIAN: Uhuh. You mean books and videos?
segments.translation: 布莱恩：嗯。你指的是书和视频之类的吗？

segments.text: TUTOR: Yes, and manuals for self-study.
segments.translation: 指导老师：是的，还有自学手册。

segments.text: Plus a lot of computer-based materials, so people can work through them at their own speed, and repeat anything they aren't sure about.
segments.translation: 除此之外电脑上还有很多资料，所以人们可以通过这些资料按照自己的节奏学习，还能够随时复习不确定的部分。

segments.text: And you can hire laptops to use in your own home or workplace as well as printers that you can take away.
segments.translation: 你还可以从这租借笔记本电脑带回家或者单位使用，还有打印机也可以拿走。

segments.text: BRIAN: Does it have anything that I could use to improve my study skills?
segments.translation: 布莱恩：有什么可以让我提高学习技巧的东西吗？

segments.text: I don't have much idea about report writing, and I'm sure I'll need it on the course.
segments.translation: 我不是很了解报告写作，而且我觉得课上肯定会用到。

segments.text: TUTOR: Oh yes, there's plenty of useful material. Just ask one of the staff.
segments.translation: 指导老师：有啊，那有很多有用的资料。咨询员工就行。

segments.text: BRIAN: Does the centre cover all the main areas of business?
segments.translation: 布莱恩：这个商务中心能够涵盖到商业的全部主要领域吗？

segments.text: TUTOR: Yes, topics like finance, and of course marketing - that's a popular one.
segments.translation: 指导老师：是的，比如金融，当然还有市场营销——非常受欢迎的一个学科。

segments.text: Local managers seem to queue up to borrow the videos!
segments.translation: 本地的经理人似乎都要排队来借阅录像！

segments.text: BRIAN: So it isn't just for students, then?
segments.translation: 布莱恩：那么这个只是供学生使用的吗？

segments.text: TUTOR: No, it's for members only, but anyone can join.
segments.translation: 指导老师：不是的，中心只对会员开放，不过任何人都可以加入会员。

segments.text: BRIAN: How much does it cost?
segments.translation: 布莱恩：会费多少钱呢？

segments.text: TUTOR: £100 a year for a company, and £50 for an individual, with no discount for students, I'm afraid.
segments.translation: 指导老师：以公司为单位的话会费是100英镑，个人申请是50镑，学生的话恐怕没有优惠。

segments.text: BRIAN: That's very helpful. Well, I think that's all.
segments.translation: 布莱恩：这些信息很有帮助。我想应该没别的要问了。

segments.text: I'd better go home and fill in the enrolment form.
segments.translation: 我最好现在就回家把报名表填了。

segments.text: Thanks for all your help.
segments.translation: 感谢你的帮助。

segments.text: TUTOR: You're welcome. Goodbye.
segments.translation: 指导老师：不客气。再见。

segments.text: BRIAN: Goodbye.
segments.translation: 布莱恩：再见。
